basic_details.job_title: Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Assam Pollution Control Board has released the official Field Engineer Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates possessing a B.E./B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or an equivalent discipline from a recognized university, along with 2 to 3 years of relevant post-qualification experience in the environmental field, can apply through email mode up to 15-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application details

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech. in Environmental Engineering / Civil Engineering / Chemical Engineering or equivalent discipline from a recognized university, Minimum 2 to 3 years of post-qualification work experience in the environmental field
qualification.details: Field Engineer: B.E. / B. Tech. in Environmental Engineering / Civil Engineering / Chemical Engineering or equivalent discipline from a recognized university. Minimum 2 to 3 years of post-qualification work experience in the environmental field is mandatory. Experience in environmental monitoring, pollution control, EIA, consent management, or related areas will be preferred. Candidates must be physically fit for field duties including site inspection and environmental sampling. Proficiency in computer operation and report writing is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer recruitment is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Field Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Field Engineer position by the Assam Pollution Control Board.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E. / B. Tech. in Environmental Engineering / Civil Engineering / Chemical Engineering or an equivalent discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 to 3 years of post-qualification work experience in the environmental field is mandatory for the Field Engineer role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Engineer position will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for this recruitment must be submitted via Email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Assam Pollution Control Board Field Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Field Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications followed by a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Assam Pollution Control Board located?
faq.answer: The Assam Pollution Control Board is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781021.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Assam Pollution Control Board?
faq.answer: The official website of the Assam Pollution Control Board is www.pcbassam.org, where you can find more details and updates.
